verses.text: Tu-in Gilead gamsung Tishbe khua panin Tishbe mi Elijah in Ahab kiangah, “A mai-ah ka din'na Israel Pasian, Topa a nungta ahih mah bangin keima thu tawh loin daitui ahi a, guah ahi zongin hong tung ding kumte sungah omlo ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin ama kiangah Topa' thu hong tung a
“Hih lai panin kihemin nisuahna lamah kihei in la, Jordan nisuahna lam Kherith lui-ah bu in
Nangmah in lui panin tui na dawn ding hi. Tua lai-ah nangmah a hong vak dingin va-akte thu ka piazo hi,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin amah pai-in Topa' thugen bangin gamta a, Jordan nisuahna lam Kherith lui gei-ah a om hi
Tua ciangin va-akte in ama kiangah zing leh nitakin anlum leh sa puak a, amah in lui panin tui a dawn hi
Tua gamsungah guah zulo ahih manin tawlkhat khit ciangin a lui a kang hi.
Tua ciangin Elijah kiangah Topa' thu hong tung a
“Ding in la, Sidon mite' khua Zarefath-ah pai-in tua lai-ah om in. Tua lai-ah nangmah a hong vak dingin meigongnu khat thu ka piazo hi,” a ci hi

Tua ahih ciangin amah dingin Zarefath-ah a pai hi. Khuapi kulhkongpi a tun' ciangin, meigongnu khat in sing na tom hi. Amah in tuanu samin, “Ka dawn theihna dingin beel khat sungah tui tawm hong paipih in,” a ci hi
Tuanu in paipih dingin a kisak laitakin, amah in tuanu samin, “Anlum neu khat hong tawi kawm in,” a ci hi

Tua ciangin amah in, “ Topa na Pasian a nungta ahih mah bangin emsa bangmah ka nei kei a, beel sungah annel khutdim khat leh um sungah sathau tawmno khat bek om hi. Tu-in keimah leh ka tapa-a' dingin tuate bawlin kote in ka nek theihna dingun singkang nih khawng a tom ka hi a, tua ciangin a si ta ding ka hi uh hi,” a ci hi

Tua ciangin Elijah in ama kiangah, “Lunghimawh kei in; pai in la na gensa bangin an hong bawl in. Kei-a' dingin mohneu khat hong bawlsak masa-in kei kiangah hong paipih in la, tua khit ciangin nang leh na tapa-a' ding bawl in
Bang hang hiam cih leh Israel Pasian, Topa in hih bangin ci hi: ‘ Topa in leitungah guah a zuksak ni matengin beel sunga annel beilo ding a, um sunga sathau zong kiam ngeilo ding hi,’ ci hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin amah pai-in Elijah' gensa bangin hih hi. Tuanu, leh amah, leh tuanu' innkuan in ni tampi sung ne uh hi
Elijah' tung tawnin Topa' thugen bangin beel sunga annel beilo a, um sunga sathau zong kiam ngeilo hi
Hih thu khit ciangin innsung nupi ahi numei' tapa a ci na hi. A natna nasia mahmah ahih manin gim semsemin a si hi
Tua ciangin amah in Elijah kiangah, “Pasian' mipa aw, kei' langkhatah bang thu nei na hi hiam? Ka khialhna a pholak ding ka tapa' sihna a piangsak dingin kei kiangah nong pai hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin amah in tuanu kiangah, “Na tapa hong pia in,” a ci hi. Amah in tuanu' ang panin amah la-in ama giahna innkhumzangah puato-in ama lupna tungah a sial hi
Tua ciangin Topa' tungah kiko-in, “ Topa ka Pasian aw, ama tapa thahna tawh ka peemna meigongnu' tung nangawnah gimna hong tungsak na hi hiam?” a ci hi
Tua ciangin naupang tungah amah thumvei kikhuangin Topa' tungah kiko a, “ Topa ka Pasian aw, hih naupang hingkiksak in,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Topa in Elijah' aw ngai hi; naupang hong nak kikin a hingkik hi
Tua ciangin Elijah in naupang la-in innkhumzang panin inn sungah paipihsuk a, a nu kiangah a pia hi. Tua ciangin Elijah in, “En in, na tapa nungta hi,” a ci hi
Numei in Elijah kiangah, “Nang, Pasian' mi na hihna leh Topa in nang tung tawnin thu a gen takpi ahihna tu-in ka thei hi,” a ci hi.
